growth_records.cite: Miserez, Florian et al. Growth of Hydrogenophaga pseudoflava on syngas: design of gas and liquid medium composition based on elemental yield coefficients. Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology (2026). DOI:10.3389/fbioe.2025.1727931. [PMC12818879]
growth_records.snippet: The highest specific growth rate was 0.042 h-1, achieved in an atmosphere with the highest fraction of H2 (40%) and O2 (4%) and the lowest fraction of CO (20%). This gas mixture was adopted for further experiments.
growth_records.notes: Bottle DoE (Table 1, bottles A-H) on CMOM; only the highest bottle mu (0.042 h-1) and an overall approximate mu (0.021 h-1) are given numerically in text, so one record for the best condition. doubling_time = ln2/0.042 = 0.6931/0.042 = 16.5 h. CMOM final concentrations computed from the paper's 4-portion prep: each portion (100 mL) diluted into 1 L final (x0.1): Na2HPO4x12H2O 45->4.5, KH2PO4 7.5->0.75, NH4Cl 15->1.5, MgSO4x7H2O 2->0.2, CaCl2x2H2O 0.3->0.03, ferric ammonium citrate 0.18->0.018, NaHCO3 10->1.0 g/L; TES1 1 mL/L. TES1 (per L stock): ZnSO4x7H2O 0.1, MnCl2x4H2O 0.03, H3BO3 0.3, CoCl2x6H2O 0.2, CuCl2x2H2O 0.01, NiCl2x6H2O 0.02, Na2MoO4x2H2O 0.03 g/L. Sodium acetate 3 g/L only for lyophilate reactivation, not this cultivation. Per Methods, H2 and CO in/out differences were too small to be reliably quantified, so CO uptake rate is not numerically reported; only CO2 production and O2 consumption were quantified in the bioreactor.

growth_records.cite: Miserez, Florian et al. Growth of Hydrogenophaga pseudoflava on syngas: design of gas and liquid medium composition based on elemental yield coefficients. Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology (2026). DOI:10.3389/fbioe.2025.1727931. [PMC12818879]
growth_records.snippet: In Cultivation 1, we observed a specific growth rate of 0.047 h-1 +/- 0.010 h-1 based on three OD600 measurements at around 40 h... The maximal CO2 volumetric formation rate obtained was 2.5 mL L-1 min-1 at t = 160 h... (1.9 mL min-1 g-1 (D
growth_records.notes: Bioreactor Cultivation 1, batch, CMOM, gas 40%H2/40%CO/10%CO2/2%O2. mu=0.047+/-0.010 h-1 (OD600, ~40 h). doubling_time=ln2/0.047=14.7 h. CO2 rates measured by off-gas MS. Unit conversion of secreted CO2 to mmol using molar volume at 30 C, 1 atm (Vm=22.414*303.15/273.15=24.87 L/mol): volumetric 2.5 mL/L/min = 2.5/24870*1000*60 = 6.03 mmol/L/h; specific 1.9 mL/min/gDCW = 1.9/24870*1000*60 = 4.58 mmol/gDCW/h. Absolute CO2 output ~5 mL/min. CO uptake not reliably quantifiable per Methods.

growth_records.cite: Miserez, Florian et al. Growth of Hydrogenophaga pseudoflava on syngas: design of gas and liquid medium composition based on elemental yield coefficients. Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology (2026). DOI:10.3389/fbioe.2025.1727931. [PMC12818879]
growth_records.snippet: In case of Cultivation 2, a specific growth rate of 0.072 h-1 +/- 0.006 h-1 based on OD600 was calculated for the first 30 h... reached a maximum with a formation rate of 4 mL min-1 L-1... 2.1 mL min-1 g-1 (DCW) for cultivation 2
growth_records.notes: Bioreactor Cultivation 2, batch, CMOM, optimized gas 40%H2/20%CO/0%CO2/4%O2. mu=0.072+/-0.006 h-1 (OD600, first 30 h); a 50-75% increase in mu_max vs Grenz-like conditions. doubling_time=ln2/0.072=9.63 h. CO2 conversions (Vm 24.87 L/mol at 30 C,1 atm): 4 mL/L/min = 4/24870*1000*60 = 9.65 mmol/L/h; 2.1 mL/min/gDCW = 2.1/24870*1000*60 = 5.07 mmol/gDCW/h. Absolute CO2 output ~8 mL/min (60% higher than Cultivation 1). After TES1 addition mu recovered to ~0.04 h-1.

growth_records.cite: Miserez, Florian et al. Growth of Hydrogenophaga pseudoflava on syngas: design of gas and liquid medium composition based on elemental yield coefficients. Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology (2026). DOI:10.3389/fbioe.2025.1727931. [PMC12818879]
growth_records.snippet: Their final DCW was 11.6 g L-1 for Cultivation 3 and 12.0 g L-1 for Cultivation 4... During Cultivations 3 and 4, the mu_max was 0.06 h-1 +/- 0.007 h-1 (computed between 0 and 40 h) and was comparable to Cultivation 2.
growth_records.notes: Bioreactor Cultivation 3, batch, OCMOM (trace elements increased to physiological needs: vs CMOM Ca 1.04x, Mo 3500x, Fe 57x, N 36x, Cu 10x), optimized gas 40%H2/20%CO/0%CO2/4%O2. mu_max=0.06+/-0.007 h-1 (0-40 h). doubling_time=ln2/0.06=11.55 h. Final DCW=11.6 g/L. Biomass yield coefficients Y_X/E from Table 2 (this study, experimental, g biomass per g element): N 6.8, Ca 1.7e3, Co 7.2e4, Cu 2.8e4, Fe 7.4e2, Mg 4.2e2, Mo 2.3e3, Ni 2.8e4, Zn 6.5e3 g/g. TES2 (per L stock): ZnSO4x7H2O 6.8, MnCl2x4H2O 0.037, H3BO3 0.3, CoCl2x6H2O 0.56, CuCl2x2H2O 0.097, NiCl2x6H2O 0.14, Na2MoO4x2H2O 1.1 g/L; 10 mL/L added. CO2 production not quantified in Cultivation 3.
